subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh in remembrance of God! Though to outward seeming thou art bewildered and wandering in the wilderness of separation and the valley of deprivation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الهی هر چند بظاهر در بادیه هجران و وادی حرمان حیران و سرگردانی
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @Manifestation of God as sun
